name: Chocolate Slices (Refrigerator Cookie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix shortening, melted chocolate, and sugars.
2. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and stir thoroughly.
3. Measure flour using the dipping method.
4. Blend dry ingredients together and mix into the shortening mixture.
5. Press and mold into a long smooth roll about 2 1/2 inches in diameter.
6. Wrap in waxed paper and chill several hours or overnight.
7. Cut into thin slices and place slightly apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 400°F for 6 to 8 minutes, or until lightly browned.
